description: Compute and adjust a closed surveying traverse in TopoCal using the raw field observations in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\traverse_input.csv' and starting parameters in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\traverse_params.txt'. Use the following starting parameters for Station 1: Easting = 500000.000, Northing = 4400000.000, and Starting Azimuth = 45°30'00". Input the interior angles and horizontal distances for the 5 stations from the CSV, compute the closure error, and adjust the traverse using the Compass (Bowditch) rule to distribute the misclosure. Export the final adjusted Easting and Northing coordinates for all 5 stations to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\traverse_results.txt'.
